svg.title: A ticket becomes pull requests — Agent Smith
svg.desc: A ticket comes in from your tracker. Agent Smith spawns one sandbox per repository, clones each repo, then drives a tool-calling loop with every sandbox while the code is written. When the work is done the orchestrator opens one pull request per repo against your git host and sets the ticket back to resolved.

g.text: git clone — one repo per sandbox
3 pull requests open, all on branch agentsmith/ticket-4471, links commented on the ticket
